common.legalFootnote: Estimates only — not tax advice. Verify with your CPA.

auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.signUpSuccess: Account created. If email confirmation is required, check your inbox before signing in.

tos.scrollHint: Scroll to the bottom to enable Accept.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.yearFallbackBanner: {{requestedYear}} IRS figures not loaded yet — estimates use {{resolvedYear}} data.
dashboard.noTrucks: No trucks yet. Import a legacy backup or add one in Settings to get started.
dashboard.stateTaxEstimateNote: State tax is a rough estimate for {{state}} — not bracket-accurate.
dashboard.scorpPayrollTitle: S-Corp status requires a payroll provider
dashboard.scorpPayrollNote: W-2 salary and 941/940 filings need a payroll provider and CPA guidance — this app estimates, it does not file.
dashboard.payrollHandledByProvider: Payroll taxes handled by a provider
dashboard.scorpPreviewNote: Educational only — not a filing recommendation. Reasonable salary ($):

deductions.title: Deductions
deductions.outOfPocketSubtitle: Tax deductible — paid by you (business card, personal card, cash)
deductions.outOfPocketEmpty: None yet — import a receipt or invoice.
deductions.withheldSubtitle: Already reflected in net pay, NOT re-deducted (ELD, insurance, truck payment)
deductions.withheldEmpty: None yet — import a settlement PDF.
deductions.personalPaymentNote: 💰 A personal payment method means this was paid with the owner's own money — it will be recorded (or kept in sync) as a Capital Account contribution.

capitalAccount.title: Capital Account
capitalAccount.linkedNote: 🔗 Contributions are linked to a source deduction — tap one, or edit its payment method on the Deductions tab, to change it.
capitalAccount.deleteDrawConfirmBody: Made a typo? This is how to fix it.

importScreen.title: Import
importScreen.pickPrompt: Photograph or upload a settlement, receipt, fuel ticket, or maintenance invoice.
importScreen.duplicateByContent: A {{label}} dated {{date}} for {{amount}} was already saved.
importScreen.duplicateByFilename: A file with this name was already imported before.
importScreen.lowConfidenceBody: The AI wasn't fully confident reading this document — check the details below before saving.
importScreen.miscIncomeNoteBody: This looks like business income (detention, layover, bonus, etc.) with no dedicated ledger yet — the document is archived, but please record it manually on the Other Income screen for now.
importScreen.contributionAdded: 💰 Added as a Capital Account contribution: {{amount}} (paid from personal funds)

camera.permissionNote: Camera access is needed to photograph receipts and settlement PDFs.

importLegacy.title: Import Legacy Backup
importLegacy.pickPrompt: Pick the JSON backup file exported from the web app (Settings → Export Data). Settlements, deductions, maintenance history, Truck Health, Capital Account, loans, cards, and bank/checking statements will be imported. Safe to run more than once — matching records are updated in place, not duplicated.
importLegacy.missingWeekEnding: ⚠ {{missing}} of {{total}} settlement(s) have no weekEnding — will use their document date instead.
importLegacy.healthDataPresent: Truck Health data present — will be applied as baseline overrides.
importLegacy.bizBalancePresent: Business balance present — will update your profile.
importLegacy.truckCreatedNoUnit: Created a truck profile (no unit number in this backup).
importLegacy.truckFailed: Truck profile could not be created — see warnings below.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dataNote: Restore settlements, deductions, maintenance history, and more from a legacy JSON backup.
settings.shareNotAvailable: Sharing isn't available on this device.
settings.languageNote: Choose the language for the app's own text. Your data (descriptions, store names) is never translated.
settings.restartRequiredBody: Restart the app to apply the new layout direction.
settings.businessProfileSubtitle: Also editable in the Tax Estimator — same underlying fields.
settings.entityTypeMoreFieldsNote: Additional Multi-Member LLC/S-Corp fields (ownership %, salary) are in the Tax Estimator.
settings.resetAllDataNote: Wipe all your business data — settlements, deductions, documents, trucks, everything — but keep your account and sign-in. Useful for starting fresh. This cannot be undone.
settings.resetConfirm1Body: This permanently deletes ALL your business data but keeps your account and login.
settings.resetConfirm2Body: There is no way to recover your data after this. Type the word below to confirm.
settings.deleteAccountNote: Permanently delete your account and all data — settlements, deductions, documents, everything. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm1Body: This permanently deletes ALL your data and cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm2Body: There is no way to recover your data after this. Type the word below to confirm.

truckHealth.title: Truck Health
truckHealth.noTrucks: No trucks yet. Add one to start tracking maintenance.
truckHealth.noIntervals: No maintenance categories configured for this truck yet.
truckHealth.noDataPrompt: No records yet — log a service in Maintenance to start tracking this category.
truckHealth.notifBannerBody: Enable notifications to get a local reminder when a maintenance category is due soon or overdue.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.empty: No maintenance records yet — import a PDF or add one manually below.
maintenance.aiInsightsNotAMechanic: Not a mechanic — informational only. General information, not professional advice.
maintenance.aiFailed: Could not get insights right now

trucks.title: Trucks
trucks.retireConfirmBody: This keeps all its history — settlements, fuel, maintenance — but hides it from pickers going forward. You can reactivate it anytime.

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.employerTaxesNote: Employer payroll tax ({{pct}}) is added automatically for W-2 employees.

loads.title: Loads
loads.empty: No loads yet — import a settlement PDF.

settlementsScreen.title: Settlements
settlementsScreen.empty: No settlements yet — import a settlement PDF.
settlementsScreen.reimportNote: Re-importing a settlement for this week replaces its settlement, loads, fuel, reimbursements, and withheld deductions in place — it never duplicates them.
settlementsScreen.deleteConfirmBody: This also removes its linked loads, fuel, reimbursements, and withheld deductions.

otherIncome.title: Other Income
otherIncome.subtitle: Business income with no dedicated ledger yet — state refunds, detention pay outside a settlement, etc.

bankStatements.title: Bank Statement
bankStatements.subtitle: View-only — imported statement data, not editable here.

confirmBalanceUpdate.title: Update Business Balance?
confirmBalanceUpdate.body: Set your business balance to {{amount}} (this statement's closing balance)?

assetRegister.title: Asset Register
assetRegister.empty: No assets yet — equipment/electronics/tools purchases will appear here.

operatingPnl.title: Operating P&L
operatingPnl.expenseBreakdownSubtitle: Schedule C rollup preview — the full Accountant Package export adds maintenance/fuel/loan interest.
operatingPnl.carrierYtdSubtitle: As printed on your most recent settlement — a reference to cross-check against the totals above, not used in this screen's math.

cashFlowScreen.title: Cash Flow
cashFlowScreen.empty: No settlements yet — import a settlement PDF.
cashFlowScreen.noLoadData: Import settlement PDFs with load data to see lane rankings.

profitAnalysis.title: Profit Analysis
profitAnalysis.ratiosSubtitle: Compared against published industry reference ranges, not peer data.
profitAnalysis.industryReferenceNote: Industry reference ranges are published figures, not live peer data from other users of this app.
profitAnalysis.aiFooter: General information, not professional tax advice.
profitAnalysis.aiFailed: Could not reach the advisor service.

shareProfit.title: Share Weekly Profit
shareProfit.subtitle: Pick which figures to include — you're never forced to share all three.
shareProfit.noSettlements: Import a settlement to share your numbers.
shareProfit.notAvailableTitle: Sharing isn't available on this device.
shareProfit.imageCopiedBody: Your branded card image was copied to the clipboard and {{app}} was opened — paste it into your post.

dashboardCustomize.title: Customize Dashboard
dashboardCustomize.subtitle: Reorder, hide, or rename any card. Your language never affects a card you haven't renamed.
dashboardCustomize.arrowHint: Use the ▲▼ arrows or Top/Bottom to reorder.

categoryPicker.bucketNote: Required so this category always counts toward your tax estimate.

w2.label: W-2 Tax Form
w2.route: Household Income (not yet wired to a screen)

government_or_misc_income.label: Misc. Income
government_or_misc_income.route: Other Income (record it there manually for now)

medical_card.label: DOT Medical Card
medical_card.route: Compliance Tracker (not yet wired to a screen)

inspection_report.label: DOT Inspection Report
inspection_report.route: Compliance Tracker (not yet wired to a screen)

registration_cab_card.label: IRP Registration/Cab Card
registration_cab_card.route: Compliance Tracker (not yet wired to a screen)

irs_2290_schedule1.label: HVUT (Form 2290) Schedule 1
irs_2290_schedule1.route: Compliance Tracker (not yet wired to a screen)

insurance_policy.label: Insurance Policy
insurance_policy.route: Compliance Tracker (not yet wired to a screen)

confirmContribution.title: Add as Owner Contribution?
confirmContribution.body: This was paid with {{method}} (personal funds). Record it as a Capital Account contribution?

taxEstimator.title: Tax Estimator
taxEstimator.includeStateTaxLabel: Include state tax in this estimate
taxEstimator.multiMemberDisclaimer: Each member files their own K-1 — this only estimates your share. Get a CPA.
taxEstimator.scorpDisclaimer: S-Corp payroll requires a payroll provider — verify with your CPA.

household.title: Spouse / Household Income
household.subtitle: Other W-2 or self-employment income in your household — added to AGI.

onboarding.title: Set Up Your Account
onboarding.noTruckYet: Add a truck in the previous step to unlock this.

companyName.title: What's your company name?
companyName.subtitle: Shown on your dashboard and shared reports. You can change this anytime in Settings.

homeState.title: What's your home state?
homeState.subtitle: Feeds your state tax estimate — you can change this later in the Tax Estimator.

dotMc.title: DOT / MC numbers
dotMc.subtitle: Optional — add these now or later in Settings.

role.title: What best describes you?
role.subtitle: This changes what the app shows you — a company driver sees per-diem/W-2 tracking instead of owner-only tools like Schedule C deductions.

truck.title: Your truck
truck.subtitle: Unit number, year/make/model, and current odometer. This seeds your Truck Health maintenance schedule.

maintenance.title: Maintenance schedule
maintenance.subtitle: We've pre-filled sensible defaults — adjust any interval now or later in Truck Health.

openingBalance.title: Opening business balance
openingBalance.subtitle: Your current checking account balance. Defaults to $0 — skip if you'd rather start from zero.

taxYear.title: Confirm tax year
taxYear.subtitle: The year your estimates are computed against.

compliance.title: Compliance Tracker
compliance.subtitle: DOT, IRP, HVUT 2290, IFTA, insurance, CDL, and drug consortium deadlines in one place.
compliance.empty: No compliance items yet. AI-imported medical cards, inspections, IRP registrations, HVUT 2290, and insurance policies will appear here automatically.
compliance.notifBannerBody: Enable notifications to get alerted as a compliance deadline approaches.

ceoMode.title: CEO Mode
ceoMode.subtitle: Your weekly business briefing, composed from your own data.
ceoMode.goalPromptBody: Before your first briefing, tell the wolf what a great week looks like — what's your weekly net-profit goal?
ceoMode.briefingFailed: Could not get your briefing right now

aiAdvisor.title: AI Advisor
aiAdvisor.subtitle: Ask anything about your business — answers use your own account data.
aiAdvisor.empty: Ask a question to get started, e.g. "How can I improve my profit per mile?"

accountantPackage.title: Accountant Package
accountantPackage.subtitle: A per-category Schedule C rollup and income summary, ready to hand to your CPA.
accountantPackage.noLoansCards: No loans or credit cards on file.
accountantPackage.incomeSubtitle: Settlement income lines besides linehaul/fuel surcharge — reimbursements are already netted into the expense categories above, not counted here.
accountantPackage.shareNotAvailable: Sharing isn't available on this device.

scorecard.title: Scorecard
scorecard.subtitle: Your business-health score at a glance.
scorecard.empty: Import a settlement to calculate your score.
